title: Comedy Circus Ke Tansen
desc: Renowned personalities team up with talented stand-up comedians to put on hilarious performances, aiming to impress the judges.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti accidentally receives female hormones during blood donation. He boasts about it to Angoori as she tries on new bangles.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti expresses his criticism towards a magazine article read by Anita. Later, Manmohan interrupts them after seeing them kiss each other.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan tries to leave the house for two days to escape Raksha Bandhan but Angoori refuses to let him go. Meanwhile, Vibhuti tries to escape from his home to avoid having a rakhi tied by Angoori.

title: Toilet: Ek Prem Katha
desc: Jaya marries Keshav but is disappointed to learn that there is no toilet in his house. As a result, Keshav tries to pacify her with temporary arrangements.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita plans Chhuttan's escape using a burka but a makeover attempt fails. However, they eventually succeed in disguising him with Vibhuti and Angoori convincing Saxena to escort him to the bus stop.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Ghungroo decides to take Balram along with him to Mathura but Kanha foils his plan. Meanwhile, Radha goes to Gokul with the rest of her friends.

title: Man Mohini
desc: Siya prays fervently while Mohini manipulates Ram, however when asked to forget Siya, he refuses and miraculously returns to her, leaving Mohini devastated.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti hosts a celebration for Tekayah at home, where Happu arrives to offer his congratulations. Meanwhile, Anita and Tiwari reach a breaking point and decide to file for a divorce.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti, posing as Santa, convinces Angoori of his wish-granting powers. Meanwhile, David intercepts Tiwari's gift intended for Anita.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti questions Tiwari about gifting a girl's dress to David. Pressured, Tiwari reluctantly gives David the gift he originally bought for Anita.
